definition: ABI contract version. Must equal wallet-abi-0.1.
Correlation identifier generated per user action. Not replay protection and not an idempotency key.
ELIP-0144 chain_id string, bip122:<first 32 characters of the network genesis block hash as lowercase hex>. Must match runtime chain ID before side effects.
Transaction-construction request body.
Whether runtime should publish the finalized transaction. false still permits sync/fetch/validation calls.
Declared inputs resolved in order. Order can affect wallet selection and issuance-linked references.
Declared outputs materialized in order. Runtime may append fee and per-asset change outputs.
Optional finite non-negative fee rate in sat/kvB.
Optional fallback locktime. Effective only when input sequence semantics activate locktime.
Caller-facing label for diagnostics and review UI.
Prevout source selector: wallet-selected from filters or caller-provided outpoint.
How runtime obtains prevout values/secrets: wallet, provided blinding_secret_key, or explicit.
Caller-supplied input blinding secret key for prevout unblinding. This is not a spend/signing private key; handle as sensitive unless explicitly policy-marked public.
Bitcoin/Elements input sequence for finality, locktime, relative locktime, and RBF semantics.
Optional issuance/reissuance metadata used for PSET issuance fields and issuance-linked output asset IDs.
Issuance kind for this input.
Amount of issued/reissued asset units to mint, encoded as a decimal string.
Amount of reissuance/inflation-token units to mint, encoded as a decimal string. Replaces token_amount_sat.
For new issuance, contract-hash entropy; for reissue, already-derived asset entropy.
Input finalization strategy: wallet/miniscript or SimplicityHL finalizer.
Caller-facing output label for diagnostics and UI.
Requested output amount in satoshi/base units, encoded as a decimal string.
How runtime determines scriptPubKey: wallet receive template, raw script, or finalizer-derived script.
ELIP-0144 asset_id string or issuance-derived asset/token selector. Explicit ELIP-0144 asset_ids must have a chain_id matching TxCreateRequest.chain_id.

Confidential reissuance/inflation token derived from a new issuance input. The resulting ELIP-0144 asset_id uses the request chain_id and the derived asset_reference. Outputs using this asset MUST NOT use blinder = explicit.
Output confidentiality policy: wallet blinding key, provided blinding pubkey, or explicit output.
Finalization variant tag.
UTF-8 SimplicityHL source loaded/instantiated at runtime.
Exact Cargo/SimplicityHL compiler version the runtime must use for compilation/address derivation/finalization.
Source for Taproot x-only internal key. Stable wallet-abi-0.1 supports only bip0341.
SIMF argument payload as a JSON object at the ABI wire level; no UTF-8 byte-array wrapper.
SIMF witness payload as a JSON object at the ABI wire level; no UTF-8 byte-array wrapper.
High-level outcome.
Finalized transaction hex and txid.
Open-ended producer metadata. Consumers must ignore unknown keys.
Structured error code, technical message, and optional details.
Caller-known compile-time/static SIMF argument values. Map from SimplicityHL argument name to {value,type} strings; values are parsed/type-checked by the requested SimplicityHL compiler.
Runtime-resolved SIMF argument directives, keyed by the target SimplicityHL argument name, such as deriving COLLATERAL_ASSET_ID from a selected issuance input.
Caller-known static witness values, keyed by SimplicityHL witness name. Examples include PATH branch selectors or COLLATERAL_AMOUNT constants encoded as typed literal strings.
Runtime-resolved witness directives. sig_hash_all signature embedding is still TODO/draft and must be finalized before production compatibility is claimed.
SimplicityHL literal string, for example Right(Left((false, 10, 1000))) or 100. Numeric values remain strings, following SimplicityHL witness-file conventions.
SimplicityHL type annotation string, for example u64, Signature, (bool, u64), or Either<...>.
